name: James River Waffles
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the egg yolks until light.
2. Stir in 1 cup buttermilk.
3. Sift together the dry ingredients and beat into the yolk mixture.
4. Stir in the remaining buttermilk and melted butter.
5. Beat the egg whites until stiff and fold in.
6. Bake in a hot waffle iron.
